summary: End-to-end testing of phone-OTP auth + booking auth-gating for HomeGlow. 19/19 pytest backend tests passed and full Playwright frontend flow (redirect-on-logged-out, OTP login, autofill, verify, booking pre-fill, profile, sign out, token persistence) passed. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: OTP TTL inconsistency: OTP_TTL_SECONDS=300 (5 min) but MongoDB TTL index is set to expireAfterSeconds=600 (10 min). The two values should match — pick one source of truth (preferably 300s).

CORS: allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' is browser-rejected for credentialed requests. Currently the frontend uses Bearer tokens (not cookies), so it works, but if cookies are ever added, set explicit origins.
Mock OTP returned in API response is appropriate for demo but should be flagged/disabled in production via an env flag (e.g., DEMO_MODE=true).
/api/auth/request-otp has no rate limit — easy to flood DB with OTP rows. Consider per-phone throttling.
JWT_SECRET is committed in /app/backend/.env; acceptable for dev but rotate before any real launch.
Multi-tenant scoping is enforced everywhere on bookings (verified). Good.
test_credentials: Phone: any random 10-digit (e.g. 9876543210). OTP: returned in /api/auth/request-otp response and rendered as data-testid=demo-otp-code on /login.
seed_data_creation: Tests create per-run users with random 10-digit phones starting with 9 to avoid collisions. No teardown (TTL on OTPs handles cleanup; user/booking rows remain — acceptable for demo).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth + booking suite is at /app/backend/tests/test_auth_bookings.py (pytest, 19 tests). Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. Frontend Playwright covered: redirect on /bookings & /book/laundry when logged out, OTP demo banner + auto-fill, verify-otp redirects to next route, header-user-chip, token persisted in localStorage as hg_token, /book/:id pre-fills phone (read-only) and name from JWT user, profile shows phone + row-logout clears token, /bookings re-protects after logout. All flows green.
